title: 该在哪一刻按快门？

svg.good: <rect width="600" height="280" fill="url(#skyNoon)"/><rect y="270" width="600" height="130" fill="url(#field)"/><g fill="#171318" transform="translate(300,150)"><circle cx="0" cy="-14" r="13"/><path d="M -8 0 Q 0 -6 8 0 L 6 30 L -6 30 Z"/><path d="M -8 4 L -30 -10 M 8 4 L 30 -10" stroke="#171318" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/><path d="M -5 30 L -22 56 M 5 30 L 22 56" stroke="#171318" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/></g><ellipse cx="300" cy="372" rx="24" ry="5" fill="#000" opacity="0.2"/>${grain}
svg.bad: <rect width="600" height="280" fill="url(#skyNoon)"/><rect y="270" width="600" height="130" fill="url(#field)"/><g fill="#171318" transform="translate(300,236)"><circle cx="0" cy="-12" r="13"/><path d="M -10 0 Q 0 -6 10 0 L 12 30 L -12 30 Z"/><path d="M -10 6 L -28 18 M 10 6 L 28 18" stroke="#171318" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/><path d="M -8 30 L -20 30 L -20 34 M 8 30 L 20 30 L 20 34" stroke="#171318" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/></g><ellipse cx="300" cy="270" rx="26" ry="5" fill="#000" opacity="0.3"/>${grain}

verdict: 更精彩的是抓住跳跃最高点的一张。
points: 动作类的关键在「决定性瞬间」:跳到最高、浪花最炸、回眸那一刻——早一拍晚一拍,张力就泄了。
人都快落地了才按下快门,最有劲的瞬间已经过去,只剩一个平淡的收尾动作。

soft.label: 练法
soft.text: 用连拍、提前预判、半按对焦守住时机;决定性瞬间是「等」来和「猜」来的,不全靠运气。
